name: M365 Copilot
arrSource: Microsoft FY26 Q3 earnings — 15M paid seats × $30/mo annualised = $5.4B list-billings

arrClaimedVsReal.realNote: 40-60% effective discounting per Citi/JPM channel checks; cloud margin down 3pp = real AI infra cost.

narrative.claimed: 15M seats x $30/mo = $5.4B list (verified, MSFT Q2 FY26 earnings)
narrative.usage: 35.8% active (Recon Analytics, 150K respondents). Only 5% of orgs past pilot (Gartner). 70% tried, only 8% kept choosing it.
narrative.real: ~$2.5-3.5B net (40-60% discounting per Citi/JPM). Cloud margin down 3pp (72->69%) — real AI infra cost.
narrative.flags: 3.3% of 450M installed base after 2 years. Market share FELL 18.8%->11.5% (Recon Analytics Jul->Jan). Auto-installing. Morgan Stanley: "wall of sorry."
